reviews.review_title: Very good but could use more variety
reviews.review_description: Some examples would be having room settings such as the max number of attachments or disallowing certain weapons, adding more attachments (one I could think up being charge, charging up a big one or a barrage of small ones) or more weapons like a proper shotgun weapon.

reviews.review_title: You should try it or smth
reviews.review_description: It’s a really good game, it has potential. I like how you mix the different modifiers with each other and get different results. I also like the range of weapons in it. It’s fun to mess around with, but I really only have one problem, and it’s not a big deal. It would be cool if there was more guns or modifiers, but it already has enough. If you want to know what this game is about, then you should read this. Basically, it’s a shooter game where you get different types of guns, and you can equip two guns per hand, and you can use modifiers that you put on the guns directly to make them have different effects, like for example there’s a modifier for larger bullets (or at least there was when I played, it might change in the future) and you would put the modifier on the gun. For actual matches, it puts you online with other people against other people (obviously) but you can also just use the guns and modifiers and test them out in the lobby, which is really fun. If you’re thinking about getting this game, you should try it.
This is a very cool concept and is well executed although it could do with more options such as a shotgun or sniper. Overall playing this game is an enjoyable experience

reviews.review_title: So much fun, one of my favourite games
reviews.review_description: There's endless fun to be had playing this game and it's definitely one of my favourites. You can just chill and head to the social area or go to battle in teams. Mostly it's been pretty good involving teamwork and some fun, although sometimes it can get pretty serious hah! Love how you can make gun combos, bravo developers! I wish there was a menu or something that said what the weapon combos did. Also sn option of being able to go to battle with family and friends would be superb. If there's one frustration, it's when the room owner leaves and the game ends. Would be great if it could be automatically transferred to someone else so everyone else still playing can finish the game rather than being booted out.

reviews.review_title: Great game would love if more content
reviews.review_description: I love the concept of how you can add modifications on your gun in order to change the properties of the outcoming bullet. But, the only issue is that I soon got bored after seeing that the is only a limited amount of things I could do. Also there needs to be more players in team gamemodes
There is no one playing. You can't play multi-player and you can't even start the game.

A lot of VR shooters just port a game in with VR controls and call it a day but NO VR game gives you this level of freedom in gameplay. Theres so many possibilities in how to approach each game and constantly adapt and evolve your abilities minute by minute.
This game has the potential to grow to be one of the greats. Highly recommend it to everyone!

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to review, glad you are enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: I was genuinely surprised at how well polished the game was when I first loaded in. From my experience, the game has a really friendly fan base who helped me learn the ropes and making new weapon combos was really exciting to see what you made
